title: Chicken Nuggets
description: A small cursed food mod giving little bits of chicken the power they deserve.
body:
The chicken nugget is a powerful cultural influence. With this tiny mod, you too can experience these tiny bits of chicken flesh!

## Experience for yourself:
* Disgusting raw nuggets
* The irreversibility of chicken destruction
* Processed foods
* Chicken shrapnel (requires Create)

## Why would you do this?
A friend asked/challenged/teased me to do this.

## You missed X about nuggets
Open an issue about it.
